title: Apply atomic batch fix to approvals handler
description:
Replace the two separate env.DB.prepare().run() calls in src/handlers/approvals.ts with a single env.DB.batch([...]) call so the approval status update and job status update land atomically. Drop-in file provided in backend-additions/src/handlers/approvals.ts.

Acceptance: grep 'DB.batch' src/handlers/approvals.ts returns a match. grep -c 'DB.prepare.*run()' src/handlers/approvals.ts returns 0 for the UPDATE statements.

title: Replace UUID.slice(0,8) with full UUID in capsule_events.event_id
description:
In src/db/queries.ts, change `evt_${crypto.randomUUID().slice(0, 8)}` to `evt_${crypto.randomUUID()}`. 8-char slice has birthday-collision risk at >10k events/workspace/day. Drop-in file provided in backend-additions/src/db/queries.ts.

Acceptance: unit test for appendEvent generates 100k event_ids with zero collisions.

title: Extend OpenAPI spec to cover jobs and approvals endpoints
description:
Replace schema/openapi.yaml with the extended version in backend-additions/schema/openapi.yaml. Adds: /v1/jobs (list), /v1/jobs/{job_id} (get), /v1/approvals/{approval_id}/approve, /v1/approvals/{approval_id}/reject. Adds typed component schemas: TaskSubmission, TaskResponse, Job, WorkspaceState, ApprovalResult, Error.

Acceptance: `npx @redocly/cli lint schema/openapi.yaml` returns 0 errors. ChatGPT Actions validation passes.

title: Extend CLI with priority, policy-tier, approval flags and approve/reject/list subcommands
description:
Replace cli/src/index.ts with the extended version in backend-additions/cli/src/index.ts. Changes: drop node-fetch dependency (Node 18+ native fetch), add --priority --tier --approval --agent --ref flags to submit, add status job/workspace subcommands, add list command with status+pagination, add approve/reject commands.

Acceptance: `ambient --help` lists: submit, status, list, approve, reject. `npm test` passes integration tests against staging backend.

title: Deploy patched Ambient backend to production Cloudflare Worker
description:
After steps 1-4 merge to main, deploy to the production Worker at optimization-inversion.genesisconductor.io.

STEPS:
1. `cd ambient-backend && npm run build`
2. `wrangler deploy`
3. Verify: curl -s https://optimization-inversion.genesisconductor.io/health returns {ok:true}
4. Smoke: submit a test task via CLI, poll status, approve, verify state projection updates.

Acceptance: health endpoint returns 200. End-to-end smoke test of submit → status → approve completes in <5s.

title: Build and publish @kovach-enterprises/ambient-mcp-server to npm
description:
Repo root: Kovach-Enterprises/ambient-mcp-server

STEPS:
1. Replace package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, README.md, llms.txt with the files from path-a-npm/ in the deployment bundle.
2. `npm install`
3. `npm run build` — verify dist/index.js exists
4. Smoke: `AMBIENT_API_KEY=<test> timeout 3 node dist/index.js` — confirm no MODULE_NOT_FOUND, server connects.
5. `npm login --scope=@kovach-enterprises`
6. `npm publish --access public`
7. `npm info @kovach-enterprises/ambient-mcp-server` — confirm live entry at v1.0.0
8. Commit to main with message: `feat: publish v1.0.0 to npm as @kovach-enterprises/ambient-mcp-server`
9. Tag: `git tag v1.0.0 && git push --tags`

Acceptance: `npx -y @kovach-enterprises/ambient-mcp-server` starts without errors given AMBIENT_API_KEY env.

title: Deploy ambient-mcp-worker to ambient.genesisconductor.io/mcp
description:
Create Cloudflare Worker at ambient.genesisconductor.io/mcp using files from path-b-worker/ in the deployment bundle.

CF account: 04c59c95ce8d0a0be98099b7f7e39d18

STEPS:
1. `mkdir -p genesis-conductor-app/ambient-mcp-worker && cd ambient-mcp-worker`
2. Copy: package.json, wrangler.toml, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts
3. `npm install`
4. Set secret: `wrangler secret put AMBIENT_API_KEY` (use prod upstream key)
5. Optional: `wrangler secret put MCP_SHARED_SECRET` for multi-tenant mode
6. `wrangler deploy`
7. Verify health: `curl -s https://ambient.genesisconductor.io/mcp/health` — expect {ok:true, tools:6}
8. MCP handshake smoke test:
   curl -X POST https://ambient.genesisconductor.io/mcp \
     -H 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
     -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-11-25","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"smoke","version":"0.0.1"}},"id":0}'
   Expect: 200 with serverInfo.name=ambient, protocolVersion=2025-11-25
9. Tool list: POST same endpoint with method=tools/list. Expect 6 tools returned.
10. Commit: `feat: deploy ambient MCP HTTP shim to ambient.genesisconductor.io/mcp`

Acceptance: /mcp/health returns 200. initialize + tools/list complete in <500ms. Any model configured with the URL can list and invoke all 6 tools.

title: Deploy operator console to console.genesisconductor.io
description:
Deploy dashboard/index.html as a Cloudflare Pages project.

STEPS:
1. Create project: `wrangler pages project create ambient-console --production-branch=main`
2. Deploy: `wrangler pages deploy dashboard/ --project-name=ambient-console`
3. Add custom domain: ambient-console.pages.dev → console.genesisconductor.io (via CF dashboard or API)
4. CORS: ensure optimization-inversion.genesisconductor.io allows Origin https://console.genesisconductor.io (add to Worker CORS list if not wildcard)
5. Set default localStorage.AMBIENT_BASE_URL via query-string handoff or instruct users to paste API key on first load (already wired in the HTML).

Acceptance: https://console.genesisconductor.io loads, prompts for API key on first visit, polls /v1/state/{ws} every 5s, renders jobs table and approval queue, approve/reject buttons POST to backend and reflect state within one tick.

title: End-to-end invariance check across Path A, Path B, and backend
description:
Seismic verification: attack each surface with adversarial inputs, confirm consistent behavior.

TEST MATRIX:
1. Submit task via Path A (stdio MCP) → verify it appears in /v1/jobs list via Path B.
2. Submit task via Path B (HTTP MCP) with shared-secret bearer → verify upstream auth substitution.
3. Submit task with requires_approval=true → verify blocked status → approve via dashboard → verify running.
4. Reject approval via CLI → verify job.status=cancelled, capsule_events has approval_rejectd entry.
5. Cross-tenant attack: call /v1/state/other_workspace with wrong bearer → expect 403.
6. Webhook: register test webhook, submit task, verify HMAC signature in X-Ambient-Signature header.
7. Rate-limit: hammer /v1/tasks at 100 rps → verify 429 response with Retry-After header (or document absence as known gap).
8. State projection consistency: submit 10 tasks rapidly → verify state.active_jobs matches jobs table count within 2 polling cycles.

Acceptance: all 8 tests pass or have documented gap tickets. Seismic report committed to docs/invariance-report.md with pass/fail per test.

title: Publish llms.txt to all public surfaces for single-prompt model integration
description:
Publish the canonical llms.txt (from path-a-npm/llms.txt) to three locations so any model can integrate the Ambient Access Layer in a single prompt pass.

LOCATIONS:
1. https://genesisconductor.io/llms.txt (root of primary domain)
2. https://ambient.genesisconductor.io/llms.txt (MCP shim root)
3. GitHub: Kovach-Enterprises/ambient-mcp-server/llms.txt (already in npm package via files array)

STEPS:
1. Add static route in genesisconductor.io CF Worker or Pages to serve llms.txt with Content-Type: text/plain.
2. Same for ambient-mcp-worker — add /llms.txt handler returning the file contents.
3. Verify GET https://genesisconductor.io/llms.txt returns 200 with text/plain and contains the routing table.

Acceptance: any LLM given the single URL https://genesisconductor.io/llms.txt can produce a valid TaskEnvelope POST without further prompting. Test with GPT-4, Gemini, and a fresh Claude conversation.
